description:
We switched from go-git's `Status()` to shelling out to `git status` in #104 because go-git produces false dirty-tree detection.

Upstream bug: https://github.com/go-git/go-git/issues/1896

Once that issue is resolved and a new go-git release includes the fix, revert to using go-git's native `Status()` method and remove the `git status` subprocess workaround.

Related commits:
- e793169 Fix false dirty-tree detection by using git status (#104)
- 95ec983 Update go-git to v5.17.0 (#105)
title: Switch back to go-git Status() once upstream bug is fixed
